modules: UI Module (Components: Display, Buttons, History Panel, Theme Switch)
Calculator Core Module (Arithmetic, Scientific, Memory Logic)
data_flow: User Interaction -> Input Handler -> Calculator Core
Calculator Core -> Error Handling Module (Report Errors)

tech_stack.Styling: CSS Modules / Styled Components / Tailwind CSS

api_spec: HistoryModule.getHistory() -> entries: Array<{expression: string, result: number}>
security: Input Validation: Sanitize and validate all user inputs.
XSS Protection: Properly escape all displayed output.
HTTPS: Deploy with HTTPS for encrypted communication.
Dependency Security: Regularly update third-party libraries.
performance: Bundle Size Optimization: Minify and compress assets, use code splitting.
Efficient Rendering: Optimize UI updates to minimize re-renders.
Caching: Utilize browser caching for static assets.
Lazy Loading: Implement for non-critical components if application scales.
